Affiliate Disclosure

How we make money — and why it never affects our recommendations.

Last updated: March 2026

SlashAI participates in affiliate marketing programs. This means when you click certain links on our site and make a purchase, we may earn a commission — at no additional cost to you.

Some companies we have affiliate relationships with include:

  • Jasper AI
  • Writesonic
  • Copy.ai
  • HubSpot
  • Surfer SEO
  • Notion
  • Grammarly
  • Murf AI
  • And other AI tool providers

Our Editorial Independence

Affiliate relationships never influence our reviews or recommendations. Here's our policy:

  • We test every tool before recommending it
  • We include honest pros AND cons in every review
  • We recommend free/cheaper alternatives when they're better
  • We remove recommendations for tools that decline in quality
  • No company can pay for placement in our roundups or comparisons

Why We Use Affiliate Links

Running a quality content site costs money (hosting, tools, time). Affiliate commissions help us keep SlashAI free for readers while maintaining our independence. It's a model that aligns our incentives with yours — we only earn when you find our recommendations genuinely useful.

Your Cost

You never pay more by using our affiliate links. In many cases, our links include exclusive discounts or extended trials that you wouldn't get going directly to the provider.

Questions?

If you have any questions about our affiliate relationships, email us at hello@slashai.app.
